utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final package, all 7 items are present. Each is fully specified: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) is specified; travel_dates (2024-09-15 to 2024-09-19) is specified; transportation includes flight details (airline, airports, class, cost) — fully specified; accommodation includes property name, type, nights, cost — fully specified; activities include multiple entries with names and costs — fully specified; additional_services include dining details with restaurant name, total cost, and dietary accommodations — fully specified; total_budget is specified with a cost breakdown. Therefore, all required items are present and fully detailed.
